items.name: Hypothesis Evaluation Agent
items.description: Developing Reinforcement Learning AI system for hypothesis evaluations

items.name: MCP for UI Design
items.tag: Researcher, Ongoing [TODO: make this into two circly tags]
items.description: Exploring MCP’s integration into user workflows, providing structure to UI design process while maintaining for user flexibility and creativity

items.name: AI Agent for Informal Peer Support
items.description: Explore implementation of AutoGen agents in pipelines, including API integration and architecture design for automation. Assisted with initial phases of this project.

items.name: Anayzing User's Usage of AI Meeting Assistants to Support Design Improvements
items.description: Explored how AI meeting assistants support user workflows to understand areas of improvement. Presented as poster in UR2PhD Research Showcase 2026 and live-presentation in UCLA Undergraduate Research Week 2026

items.name: HALO: Computational & Interactive Support for Hypothesis Generation for Scientific Discovery
items.description: Developed a molecular generation platform, integrating large language models, API routing, and database logging to support research workflows. Built pipeline that effectively filtered out 80% of low-quality molecules generated, improving system efficiency and usability.

items.name: RAGPPI: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Benchmark for Protein–Protein Interactions in Drug Discovery
items.description: Implemented and evaluated GraphRAG. Prepared 50 sets of user study documents and analyzed expert responses with model outputs to identify patterns to guide model improvement.

items.name: Interactive Design Patterns in GenAI Applications
items.description: Researched and identified 17 interactive design patterns across 20 Generative AI platforms, analyzing differences in user experience and integration strategies.

items.name: Behavioral Indicators of Overreliance During Interaction with Conversational Language Models
items.description: Recruited 180+ participants and conducted 8 user experience experiments on human and AI interaction, managing communications with participants.

items.name: RoomPalette: Gen AI for Interior Design
